mnemonics.title: Serverless Characteristics
mnemonics.content: ESCAP - Event-driven, Scaling automatic, Cost pay-per-use, Administration minimal, Persistence external

mnemonics.title: Container Orchestration Benefits
mnemonics.content: SHADE - Self-healing, Horizontal scaling, Automated rollouts, Discovery (service), Environment consistency

mnemonics.title: Emerging Cloud Paradigms
mnemonics.content: SEAM-G - Serverless (FaaS), Edge computing, AI/ML platforms, Microservices (containers), GitOps (IaC)
